metadata.title: KMEKI Composites – Custom Composite Manufacturing
metadata.description: KMEKI COMPOSITES s.r.o. – manufacturing composite parts for industry, sport and architecture. On the market since 1995, 50 employees, certified production.

hero.title: Custom Composite Solutions
hero.subtitle: For production we provide models and subsequently forms according to customer requirements. We use materials suitable for specific production with the required certificate.

home.title: KMEKI Composites | About Us
home.description: KMEKI COMPOSITES s.r.o. – custom composite manufacturing since 1995. Industry, sports, architecture. 50 employees, 1,000 m² production facility.
home.aboutText: KMEKI has been in business since 1995, employs approximately 50 people and occupies a 1,000 square meters facility in Lánov, Czech Republic. Our products are sold worldwide under KMEKI brand name or sold to other manufacturers via distributors and direct sales.
home.sectorsSubtitle: We cover a wide range of industries with emphasis on quality and innovation
home.industryDesc: Lining for trams and trains, switchboard covers, engine covers, automotive tuning and carbon parts for motorsport.
home.sportDesc: Carbon outsoles for skates, hockey helmets, reinforcements for ski jumping boots, boats.
home.architectureDesc: Beams, tiles, window sills, architectural units and models, products for applied arts.
home.techSubtitle: We have modern production technologies and certifications
home.ctaText: Contact us and we will discuss your requirements. From model through molds to the finished product including testing.
home.clientsSubtitle: We collaborate with leading companies in industry, sport and architecture

industry.title: KMEKI | Automotive & Engineering Industry
industry.description: Composite parts for the automotive and engineering industry. Lining for trams and trains, switchboard and engine covers, motorsport parts.
industry.heroSubtitle: Composite solutions for transport, engineering and motorsport
industry.service3: Forms made from supplied model or produced from 3D data
industry.service4: Products can be tested for strength, flame resistance, etc.
industry.service5: Composition of products can be customized after prototype testing
industry.introText: With advanced production technologies and certifications, we deliver top-quality composite parts for leading Czech and international manufacturers. From tram interior lining for Škoda Transportation to engine covers and carbon parts for motorsport — every product is custom-made.
industry.ctaText: We'd be happy to discuss your requirements for composite parts for industrial use. We offer complete service from design through manufacturing to testing.

sport.title: KMEKI | Production for Sport
sport.description: Composite parts for the sports industry. Carbon outsoles for skates, hockey helmets, ski jumping boots, boats for water sports.
sport.heroSubtitle: Carbon and composite parts for sports equipment and boats
sport.introText: We manufacture carbon and composite parts that push sports equipment to the next level of performance. We work with leading brands like Botas and supply components from racing canoes to carbon reinforcements for ski jumping boots.
sport.ctaTitle: Looking for a sports manufacturing partner?
sport.ctaText: Contact us and together we'll find the optimal solution for your sports products. We offer prototype development and series production.

architecture.title: KMEKI | Architecture & Construction
architecture.description: Composite elements for architecture and construction. Beams, tiles, window sills, architectural units and models, applied arts.
architecture.heroSubtitle: Composite elements for modern architecture and buildings
architecture.service1: Production of individual parts and technological units
architecture.service2: Certificate for welding process according to EN 15085-2
architecture.service3: Tests for strength, fire resistance or specific customer needs
architecture.service5: Products for architectural units or models
architecture.introText: Composite materials in architecture offer a unique combination of low weight, durability and design freedom. We produce beams, tiles, window sills and complete architectural units as well as applied art products.
architecture.ctaText: From initial concept to final installation — we'll help you realize your vision using modern composite materials.

references.title: KMEKI | References
references.description: References and photo galleries of KMEKI Composites projects. Architecture, industry, tram T15, sport.
references.heroSubtitle: Explore our projects in industry, sport and architecture

contacts.title: KMEKI | Contacts
contacts.description: Contact KMEKI COMPOSITES s.r.o. – address, phone, email, contact form.
contacts.heroSubtitle: Get in touch, we'll be happy to help with your project
contacts.formSubtitle: If you have any questions, please use the form below. We will respond as soon as possible.
contacts.formConsent: I agree to the processing of personal data
contacts.formError: An error occurred. Please try again.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy | KMEKI COMPOSITES s.r.o.
gdpr.description: Information on the processing of personal data of suppliers of goods and services under GDPR – KMEKI COMPOSITES s.r.o.
gdpr.heroSubtitle: Information on the processing of personal data of suppliers of goods and services
gdpr.intro: KMEKI COMPOSITES s.r.o. processes personal data of suppliers of goods and services (natural persons-entrepreneurs) in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
gdpr.controllerText: KMEKI COMPOSITES s.r.o., registered office: 17. listopadu 237, 530 02 Pardubice, Company ID: 64824284. Contact for exercising rights: facility Lánov 156, 543 41 Lánov.
gdpr.purpose1: Fulfilling a business contract / negotiating a business contract
gdpr.processing1: Automated: Economic system "STEREO" (address and identification data)
gdpr.processing2: Manual: Paper form (contracts, delivery notes, tax documents)
gdpr.scopeText: Name, surname, business name, registered office, Company ID, VAT ID, email, phone.
gdpr.retention1: For the duration of the contractual relationship
gdpr.retention2: For the period required by tax obligations
gdpr.right6: Right not to be subject to automated decision-making
gdpr.authorityText: Office for Personal Data Protection, Pplk. Sochora 27, 170 00 Prague 7, email: posta@uoou.cz
